action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end baseline and immediate eval to validate data loading, checkpointing, and prediction contract. Decision: implement CLIP ViT-B/16 image classifier using cached timm pretrained weights, class-balanced sampling, basic camera-trap augmentations, train for 2 epochs, save best checkpoint, and submit eval.
